_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in evaluating data platform technology options against requirements, including performance, scalability, cost, security, and operational complexity trade-offs.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-007 (DA, cosine: 0.489), OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.488).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.2/10 (raw 0.323). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [machines, using, virtual] vs WIDAI-only terms [against, complexity, cost, data, evaluating, offs] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.916, R=0.839). P exceeds R by 0.077 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Skill in using virtual machines." and "Skill in evaluating data platform technology options against requirements, inclu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.499 > STS 0.323 (gap +0.176). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [machines, using, virtual]. WIDAI-only: [against, complexity, cost, data, evaluating, offs].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.176 with low STS 0.323. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
